title: zexmenia umbellata
intro: Zexmenia umbellata, also known as Mexican Zexmenia, is a flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to Mexico and the southwestern United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Zexmenia umbellata include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Zexmenia umbellata include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
